title: Uppsala Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Uppsala, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This extreme weather event has a critical level of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Uppsala are extreme, with a high humidity of 80% and moderate wind speed of 9.0 km/h.
The cold snap has resulted in a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD) to 13.4 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG.
This anomaly is expected to have a significant impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Uppsala.
